responsibilities: Design and execute molecular cloning experiments to engineer recombinant constructs for protein expression studies
Perform mammalian and microbial cell culture to support upstream bioprocess development and scale-up activities
Conduct PCR, qPCR, and gel electrophoresis assays to validate genetic modifications and confirm experimental outcomes
Develop and optimize protein purification workflows using chromatography techniques to achieve target purity and yield
Operate and monitor bioreactors to optimize fermentation conditions for microbial or cell-based production systems
Document experimental protocols and results in compliance with GLP and GMP regulatory standards
Collaborate with process development and quality assurance teams to transition lab-scale processes to pilot production
Analyze experimental data using statistical software to support research conclusions and regulatory submissions
